summary: Broad stop test filter timed out after focused stop replay test passed
raw: Verification task 089226mvm0 timed out after 120s during `cargo test -p jcode stop --lib -- --nocapture`. The new focused test `server::comm_session::comm_session_tests::stop_replay_does_not_send_duplicate_close_request` passed first, but the broad `stop` substring filter also selected unrelated tests such as await_members_stops_when_requesting_client_disconnects and session_search stop-word tests; several were still running when the supervisor timeout fired.
followUp: Rerun a tighter stop-handler verification filter instead of the broad `stop` substring filter, which included unrelated long-running tests.

summary: Initial implicit await run scope verification failed due to test assertion type error
raw: Focused verification task 8082575cwx failed during test compilation with E0599 because the new test called as_deref() directly on Result<Option<String>, String> instead of unwrapping the Result first. Production code compiled far enough to reach test compile; the issue was test assertion syntax.
followUp: Fixed the test assertion to unwrap Result before calling Option::as_deref, then rerun focused verification.
